title: UN reports record levels of settler violence in the West Bank

snapshot.title: UN reports record levels of settler violence in the West Bank
snapshot.description: Violence by Israeli settlers in the occupied West Bank has reached record levels, with an average of six attacks daily causing casualties or damage, the UN said Thursday. The number of such attacks this year has surpassed 1,000, said Stephane Dujarric, spokesman for the UN chief, citing the UN’s Office for the Coordination of Humanitarian Affairs (OCHA). “Just last week,
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: UN reports record levels of settler violence in the West Bank | Arab News
